name: Berks County Potato Custard Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potato until tender, then mash it fine.
2. Add the butter and sugar to the mashed potato mixture and stir until smooth.
3. Allow the mixture to cool before adding the beaten egg yolks, milk, lemon juice, and grated rind.
4. Mix all ingredients together well.
5. Carefully fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Pour the batter into a pie pan lined with pastry crust.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 25 minutes.
